submit_phase.pii_prompt_submitted: 내 주민등록번호는 880101-1234567 인데 이걸로 무엇을 알 수 있어?

v6a_ndjson_block_indicators.note: Two POSTs to /api/v3/runInferenceTranscript both returned 200 with 1.3kB — much smaller than a normal LLM response (typically 10-100kB+), consistent with synthetic NDJSON block payload
v6a_ndjson_block_indicators.console_errors_observed: POST /api/v3/markInferenceTranscriptSeen returned 404; HttpRequestError: Received HTTP 404; runFromStep: runInferenceTranscriptApiError; inferenceTranscriptAnalyticsActions errors — all consistent with Notion client failing to reconcile the truncated/synthetic V6-A response

reload_phase.method: Ctrl+Shift+R hard reload (forces new H2 connection)

post_submit_request.interpretation: V6-A NDJSON block intercepted — synthetic small response replaced full streaming inference

post_reload_request.response_body_signature: Authentic Notion SSR HTML with #initial-loading-spinner CSS (position: fixed; height: 100vh; width: 100vw), .notion-app initialization, transform: rotate(360deg) keyframes
post_reload_request.interpretation: Notion SSR HTML pass-through — V6-E page_inject_h2 did NOT fire on hard-reload's new H2 connection. Engine emitted no synthetic warning HTML.

dom_scan.post_reload_dom_state: Normal Notion SSR rendered — sidebar with 최장희's Space, 홈/채팅/회의/수신함 tabs, '아직 채팅 없음' empty thread placeholder, Notion AI agent card, full chat input bar with placeholder 'AI에게 질문하기' / 'AI로 무엇이든 시도해 보세요'

comparison_vs_707.delta: NONE — V6-E domain-keyed shared map (mutex-protected, 5min TTL) did not fix the cross-connection scope problem. Hard reload still returns authentic Notion SSR HTML on the new H2 connection. Same regression as V6-D.

diagnostic_hypothesis.v6e_intent: Domain-keyed shared map (mutex-protected, 5min TTL) so page_inject_h2 fires on hard-reload's new H2 connection by looking up domain block state instead of per-tuple last_pii_block_at_ms
diagnostic_hypothesis.observed_behavior: Hard-reloaded chat document came back as ~12kB authentic Notion SSR HTML, identical to V6-D
possible_root_causes: Domain key lookup may not be reaching the page_inject_h2 hook on the new H2 stream
Mutex/TTL window may have expired between submit and reload (but reload happened within ~10s, well under 5min)
page_inject_h2 may only check per-tuple state and never query the new domain map
Block state may be set on the runInferenceTranscript path but the query for page_load text/html may not consult the same map
engine_h2_emit may be skipping page_inject for non-streaming text/html responses
diagnostic_hypothesis.recommended_next_step: Engine-side: add trace logging at page_inject_h2 entry on the reload H2 stream — verify (a) domain map lookup is invoked, (b) lookup returns hit for notion.so, (c) inject hook is reached but bypassed, or (d) hook never fires. Also confirm 5min TTL hasn't been mistakenly bound to per-tuple lifetime.

notion_status: NOT_DONE — V6-E does not satisfy DONE criteria (warning HTML on hard reload). Still PARTIAL like V6-D.
